# Task

## Goal

Describe the outcome this task should achieve.

## Scope

List the specific work included.

## Files Likely Affected

List expected files or directories.

## Constraints

List product, architecture, validation, or workflow constraints.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Scope is implemented.
- [ ] Tests are added or updated where needed.
- [ ] Validation passes.
- [ ] Manual work is documented.

## Validation Commands

```bash
cd backend
make format-check
make lint
make test
```

## Manual Work Required

List any CI, review, deployment, or external actions required.

## Out of Scope

List explicitly deferred work.
